  • Open

    KFC Offers BOGO 8-piece Fried Chicken Bucket Deal on December 31, 2025
    As a special for New Year's Eve, KFC is offering a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece buckets of fried chicken on December 31, 2025. The deal is available only to KFC Rewards members when ordering online through the KFC website or mobile app at participating locations nationwide. The 8-piece bucket is comprised of fried chicken legs and thighs only (i.e., dark meat). According to KFC, millions of people order takeout or delivery on New Year's Eve and "fried chicken, bubbly, and caviar have become the high–low pairing of the moment." Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

Here's what's included: Tuesday Drops 12/30/25 - $1 Crunchwrap for the first 30,000 rewards members at 2PM PT (limit one per user). 1/6/26 - $1 Chicken Quesadilla for the first 30,000 rewards members at 2PM PT (limit one per user). 1/20/26 - $1 Chalupa from 2PM –3PM PT (limit one per user). In-App Deals Through 1/4/26 - $0 delivery fee with the purchase of any Cantina Chicken Menu item (excludes Avocado Verde Salsa Sauce Packet) every Thursday (except December 25th) and from Saturday to Monday.     Pizza Hut Offers BOGO Large Pizza Deal from December 26 through December 28, 2025
    From December 26 through December 28, 2025, Pizza Hut is offering a deal where you can get a free large pizza when you buy any large pizza online at the regular menu price using the code "SUPREME". The deal coincides with the first weekend of the debut of the new movie, Marty Supreme, which launches on Christmas Day. Pizza Hut is calling it the "Party Supreme Deal." The deal will be available nationwide at participating locations. Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Pizza Hut Announces Party Supreme BOGO Deal from December 26 Through December 28, 2025
    Pizza Hut is celebrating the end of the year with the launch of its Party Supreme Deal at participating locations from December 26 through December 28, 2025. More specifically, the Party Supreme Deal is a BOGO offer where anyone can get a free large pizza with the purchase of any large pizza.   • Open

    Review: Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses
    Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses feature white creme droplet-shaped Kisses embedded with cookie pieces. A 9-oz bag retails for $5.99, but I received this courtesy of Hershey's. There was a nice brown sugar and cinnamon cookie smell when I opened the bag. There were notes of cinnamon and vanilla to give the white creme a snickerdoodle flavor, while the cookie pieces delivered a nice crunch. It was creamy and not too sweet. The cookie pieces reminded me of Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme, only not chocolate. When it comes down to it, I like snickerdoodles, and Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses capture the flavor well with some crunch to boot. Nutritional Info - Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses Serving Size - 7 pieces (54g) Calories - 160 Fat - 6g (Saturated Fat - 5g) Sodium - 35mg Carbs - 20g (Sugar - 16g) Protein - 2g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Chipotle Unveils New High Protein Menu
    Ahead of the new year and its requisite resolutions, Chipotle is launching its first-ever High Protein Menu in the US and Canada on Tuesday, December 23, 2025. The new curated menu includes options ranging from 15 to 80 grams of protein per item, including a new High Protein Cup, which is a 4-oz cup of the chain's Adobo Chicken (32g protein, 180 calories) for an average price of $3.82. Also on Chipotle's High Protein Menu are: - Double High Protein Bowl (81g protein, 11g fiber, 760 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, light white rice, black beans, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and extra romaine lettuce. - High Protein-High Fiber Bowl (46g protein, 14g fiber, 540 calories) - Adobo Chicken, light brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, roasted chili-corn salsa, fresh tomato salsa, and romaine lettuce - High Protein-Low Calorie Salad (36g protein, 10g fiber, 470 calories) - Adobo Chicken, Supergreens lettuce mix, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, and guacamole. - Double High Protein Burrito (79g protein, 6g fiber, 840 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, fresh tomato salsa, fajita veggies, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla. - Adobo Chicken Taco (15g protein, 190 calories) - Adobo Chicken, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce on a soft flour tortilla. Photo via Chipotle. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Crumbl Bakes New Salted Caramel Brownie and More Through December 27, 2025
    Crumbl bakes its new Salted Caramel Brownie and more for a limited time from December 22 through December 27, 2025. With Christmas coming in a few days, this week's lineup is heavy on the holiday/winter themes. Here's what you can expect: - New Salted Caramel Brownie - A warm chocolate brownie topped with a layer of caramel, a semi-sweet chocolate drizzle, and a pinch of sea salt. - Peppermint Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled vanilla bean cookie with peppermint pieces topped with peppermint white drop frosting and crushed peppermint pieces. - Biscoff Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled brown sugar cookie topped with a buttercream made with Biscoff cookie butter and cookie crumbs. - Sugar Cookie featuring Mother's Reindeer Games - A warm sugar cookie with red and green sprinkles, topped with a pool of white chocolate (with more sprinkles) and a Mother's Reindeer Games cookie. - Frozen Hot Chocolate Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookie topped with hot cocoa-flavored mousse and mini marshmallows. - Cinnamon Roll Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie topped with cinnamon streusel and a swirl of vanilla cream cheese frosting. - Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a dash of flaky sea salt. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Checkers & Rally's Offers $3 Cheese Double and Large Fries Deal on December 22 and 23
    With Christmas arriving this week, Checkers & Rally's is offering a deal where you can get a Cheese Double burger and a large order of Famous Seasoned Fries for $3 on Monday, December 22, and Tuesday, December 23, 2025, at participating locations. The Cheese Double features two grilled beef patties, American cheese, diced onion, dill pickles, ketchup, and mustard, served on a toasted sesame seed bun. It's a value-priced burger that was recently featured in the chain's $4 Meal Deal. Checkers & Rally's offered this same deal for National Hamburger Day. Photo via Checkers & Rally's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Review: Trader Joe's - Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches
    Trader Joe's Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches feature two layers of vanilla ice cream sandwiched between two gingerbread cookies shaped like men. A 13.52-oz box of four sandwiches costs $3.99. The ice cream sandwich was fairly small and snackable. There are strong, warm spices (cinnamon and ginger), and brown sugar notes from the soft gingerbread cookies. They're not so soft that they stick to your finger like the traditional chocolate ice cream sandwiches I grew up eating, but they're easy to bite into without much in the way of crumbs dropping. The vanilla ice cream is flecked with vanilla beans, but the vanilla flavor struggles to come across as the gingerbread cookies are definitely the star of the show. The ice cream was sweet and creamy. Overall, Trader Joe's Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches were really nice and definitely worth a try if you're a fan of soft gingerbread and ice cream. Both the flavor and the appearance fit the holiday season well. Nutritional Info - Trader Joe's Gingerbread Ice Cream Sandwiches Serving Size - 1 sandwich (54g) Calories - 170 Fat - 6g (Saturated Fat - 4.5g) Sodium - 80mg Carbs - 24g (Sugar - 12g) Protein - 3g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    New Big Ranch Wrap Arrives at Whataburger Along with Two Returning Items
    Starting December 30, 2025, Whataburger launches the new Big Ranch Wrap and brings back two menu items: the Monterey Melt and Chicken Fajita Taco. The Big Ranch Wrap features a crispy chicken strip, lettuce, tomato, buttermilk ranch, and American cheese, wrapped up in a flour tortilla. Whataburger's take on a Snack Wrap will cost $3 at participating locations. The Monterey Melt consists of two beef patties, Monterey Jack and American cheeses, grilled onions and peppers, and Jalapeno Ranch served between two slices of Texas toast. The Chicken Fajita Taco features strips of grilled chicken breast, seared onions, poblano, and red peppers, folded in a warm flour tortilla. All three items will be available for a limited time only. Photo via Whataburger. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    KFC Offers Free Big Box Meal with $10 Purchase
    As a promotion timed in concert with a boxing match between Jake Paul and Anthony Joshua live on Netflix on December 19, 2025, KFC is offering its rewards members a deal where they can get a free Big Box Meal with an online purchase of $10 or more. The deal is available from December 19 through December 21, 2025, at participating locations nationwide. The available Big Box Meal options include: 3-pc Chicken Big Box Meal - Three pieces of fried chicken, two sides, a biscuit, and a medium drink. 5-pc Tenders Big Box Meal - Five tenders, two sides, a biscuit, and a medium drink. Chicken Sandwich + Nuggets Big Box Meal - A Classic or Spicy Chicken Sandwich, five chicken nuggets, a side, and a medium drink. Prices vary, but Big Box Meals normally range from $15.99 to $18.39 at my local KFC here in Los Angeles. Then, with the college football season, KFC will be offering a buy-one-get-one-free Famous Bowl deal during all college football bowl games for KFC Rewards members when ordering online. Other limited-time, national deals at KFC right now include: $4.99 Pot Pies Three Large Sides for $10 when ordering online (they're calling it "Sidesgiving") Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Taco Bell Brings Back Quesarito
    The Quesarito returns to Taco Bell for a limited time starting December 18, 2025. The Quesarito (a portmanteau of "quesadilla" and "burrito") features a grilled quesadilla filled with melted 3-cheese blend and warm nacho cheese sauce, wrapped in burrito fashion around a combination of seasoned beef, seasoned rice, Creamy Chipotle Sauce, and reduced-fat sour cream. It carries a suggested price of $4.99. Taco Bell's Quesarito was introduced in 2014, and the chain released various variants of it over the years until discontinuing it in 2023. It's one of those items that the chain stocks the ingredients to make, but no longer offers. The chain will be offering a Tuesday Drop on December 23, 2025, at 2PM PT on the Taco Bell mobile app, where the first 30,000 rewards members can get a $1 Quesarito deal. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Taco Bell Welcomes Back The Quesarito
    Touted as a “holiday miracle,” Taco Bell today announced that its fan-favorite Quesarito is finally coming back to menus nationwide starting December 18, 2025. The iconic Quesarito features seasoned beef and rice with reduced‑fat sour cream and chipotle sauce, wrapped burrito‑style inside a grilled, cheese‑filled quesadilla with Nacho Cheese sauce.
